Operation 'get-feed-download-url' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too vague and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Missing: (1) what the operation actually returns (PresignedUrlResponse schema), (2) input parameter context (filter conditions), (3) authentication requirements (BasicAuth), (4) domain context (presigned URLs, temporary access). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose, expected inputs, complete output structure, authentication, and temporary nature of the URL for better AI agent interpretability and routing decisions.

data.current_description: Get the Download URL and other details of the static files.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve presigned download URL for feed files
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a presigned download URL and file metadata for EWS feed files. Accepts filter conditions to specify which feed file to access. Returns a PresignedUrlResponse containing the download URL, file information (name, size, format), and link details for direct file access. Requires BasicAuth authentication. The presigned URL is temporary and can be used for direct file downloads without additional authentication.
